title: PVP Enhanced
description: A performance-focused client-side modpack built for competitive Minecraft PVP—max FPS, clear visuals, and combat-ready QoL.
body:
⚔️ PVP Enhanced

PVP Enhanced is a lightweight, client-side modpack built for competitive Minecraft PVP and performance-focused servers.
It strips away distractions, maximizes FPS, and adds essential combat QoL tweaks—without changing vanilla gameplay mechanics.

🚀 Performance & Optimization

Sodium, Entity Culling, More Culling, FerriteCore – Huge FPS boosts for smoother fights.

Fast Better Grass & Cull Leaves – Cleaner visuals without sacrificing speed.

Fog Remover & Clear Weather – Better visibility in all environments.

⚔️ Combat-Oriented QoL

Low On Fire & Low Shield – Keeps the screen clear in fights.

Small Shield & Totem – Compact UI for better vision.

No Pumpkin Blur & No Particles – Remove visual clutter.

AppleSkin – Quick hunger/saturation info for regen strategies.

Durability Tooltip – Track gear durability mid-battle.

✨ Visual & Utility Enhancements

Entity Model Features & Entity Texture Features – Supports detailed player/entity cosmetics.

Continuity – Seamless connected textures.

New Glowing Ores & Blue Netherite – Extra clarity in resources and gear.

Fullbright – Always see clearly, no matter the light level.

Zoomify – Smooth Optifine-style zoom for better awareness.

Mouse Tweaks – Faster inventory management during fights.

Simple Voice Chat – Team communication made easy.

⚙️ Core & Config Support

Fabric API, Kotlin, Cloth Config, YACL – Essential mod support.

Mod Menu – Clean and easy mod management.

Particle Core & Config Libs – Stable performance and compatibility.

🧩 What This Pack Offers

✔ Max FPS & smooth gameplay – optimized for competitive play.
✔ Cleaner visuals – reduced clutter for clear focus in fights.
✔ Combat-ready UI – no fire, no blur, no oversized shields.
✔ Team play support – integrated voice chat.
✔ 100% client-side – safe for all PVP/competitive servers.

Dominate your next duel, clan war, or competitive server with PVP Enhanced—built to give you clarity, speed, and precision.

Join the discord server if you have any bugs or issues
